== Notes for [[Item:Q105871|Q105871]] ==

* Wilaadat (Birth):
* Wafaat (Death): 9th ZilHajja 60 AH (12th September 680 AD)

Notes of Research by Mulla Saadullah Husami.

Sayyidna Muslim bin Aqeel is considered as the major Shaheed in the battle of Karbalaa ,having been attained Shahaadat in Kufa when he went there to ask the Kufis as to why and what for they had called Imaam e Husain in Kufa and Iraq.He was greeted with negligence and makr o fareb and ultimately Yazeedi Qaum laid him as martyr at Kufa on 9th Zulhajja ,the day Imaame Husain left Makka e Muazzama for Kufa Iraq via Madeena e Munawwara.

His Rauza is just besides Masjid-e-Kufa in Iraq.

Source:
--------------------
* Wilaadat (Birth):
* Wafaat (Death): Zil-Hajj 60 AH (September 680 AD)

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:5119174896940136820

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
